prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! Taking that first step towards a challenging task can be daunting, but it's essential to confront those obstacles head-on. Remember, every difficulty presents an opportunity for growth and learning. Push through the initial discomfort, and you'll feel a sense of accomplishment and pride in yourself. Take breaks when needed, ask for help when stuck, and don't be afraid to celebrate your progress along the way. You've got the strength, determination, and intelligence to conquer this task. Go get 'em, tiger!
